# W003 is suppressed for nonil-tagged fields inherited through struct
# embedding. The tag on PageData.S applies even when accessed through
# a struct that embeds PageData.

check-templates -w
! stderr 'config.Strings'

-- go.mod --
module example.com/app

go 1.25.0
-- main.go --
package main

import (
	"embed"
	"fmt"
	"html/template"
	"net/http"
)

//go:embed *.gohtml
var source embed.FS

var templates = template.Must(template.ParseFS(source, "*"))

type Strings struct {
	AppName string
	Welcome string
}

type PageData struct {
	Title string
	S     *Strings `templatecheck:"nonil"`
}

type DashboardPage struct {
	PageData
	ItemCount int
}

func handleDashboard(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	_ = templates.ExecuteTemplate(w, "dashboard.gohtml", DashboardPage{
		PageData:  PageData{Title: "Dashboard", S: &Strings{AppName: "MyApp", Welcome: "Hi"}},
		ItemCount: 42,
	})
}

var _ = fmt.Sprint

-- dashboard.gohtml --
<h1>{{.S.AppName}}</h1>
{{$s := .S}}
<p>{{$s.Welcome}}, you have {{.ItemCount}} items.</p>
